datasetIds.title: Source dataset IDs or names
datasetIds.description: One or more Apify dataset IDs (or names) to read items from and merge together.

matchMode.title: Matching mode
matchMode.description: Exact = fast, hash-based matching on exact field values. Fuzzy = catches near-duplicates like typos, 'Corp' vs 'Corporation', abbreviations.

dedupFields.title: Deduplication fields (exact mode)
dedupFields.description: Used when matchMode = exact. Field names used as the dedup key. Supports dot notation for nested fields, e.g. 'contact.email'. Leave empty to only merge (no deduplication).

fuzzyFields.title: Fuzzy match fields (fuzzy mode)
fuzzyFields.description: Used when matchMode = fuzzy. Field(s) to compare with similarity scoring instead of exact equality. Supports dot notation. All listed fields must meet the threshold for two items to count as duplicates.

similarityAlgorithm.title: Similarity algorithm (fuzzy mode)
similarityAlgorithm.description: Levenshtein: general-purpose edit-distance, good for any text. Jaro-Winkler: weights matching prefixes more heavily, best for names and company names.

similarityThreshold.title: Similarity threshold (fuzzy mode)
similarityThreshold.description: 0 to 1. Two values are considered duplicates when their similarity score is at or above this threshold. 0.85-0.9 is a safe starting point; lower values catch more duplicates but risk false matches.

blockingPrefixLength.title: Blocking prefix length (fuzzy mode)
blockingPrefixLength.description: Performance safeguard: only compares items whose normalized fuzzy field shares this many starting characters. Prevents slow O(n^2) comparisons on large datasets. Set to 0 to compare every item against every other item (most accurate, slowest - fine for a few thousand rows, not for millions).

stripBusinessSuffixesOption.title: Strip business suffixes (fuzzy mode)
stripBusinessSuffixesOption.description: Removes common suffixes (Inc, Corp, LLC, Ltd, GmbH, etc.) before comparing, so 'Microsoft Corp' and 'Microsoft Corporation' are recognized as the same company.

keepOccurrence.title: Which occurrence to keep
keepOccurrence.description: When duplicates are found, keep the first or the last occurrence encountered (source order = order of datasetIds, then item order within each dataset).

caseInsensitive.title: Case-insensitive matching
caseInsensitive.description: Ignore letter case when comparing dedup field values.

trimWhitespace.title: Trim whitespace
trimWhitespace.description: Trim leading/trailing whitespace from dedup field values before comparing.

outputDatasetName.title: Output dataset name (optional)
outputDatasetName.description: If set, results are written to a named dataset with this name/ID instead of the run's default dataset.

maxItems.title: Max items to process (optional)
maxItems.description: Safety limit - stop after reading this many total items across all source datasets. Leave empty for no limit.

apifyApiToken.title: Your Apify API token (optional, needed for reading datasets from OTHER runs)
apifyApiToken.description: Actor runs can only access their own storage by default. If your source dataset(s) came from a different actor run, paste your personal API token here (Console -> Settings -> Integrations) so this actor can read them. Not needed if you're only reading datasets produced by this same actor.
